title: Karingal
content:
Roof Restoration Karingal

Sandhurst Roofing offers excellent customer service and our team provide quality workmanship on all jobs, big or small. We offer everything from gutter repairs and installation to roof repairs and roof restoration services to the residents of Karingal.

Our very experienced team are highly knowledgeable in working with all types of materials and roofs. Everything from cement tiled roofs, flat metal roofs, terracotta tiled roofs or Colorbond roofing.  We are ready to help you restore or repair your roof.

Get a Quote!

Fully Licensed & Insured Roof Repair & Restoration

Sandhurst Roofing is pleased to have over 30 years’ experience as a family owned and operated business, developing into one of Melbourne’s primary roofing companies. We guide you every step of the way and take time to consider your exact requirements at every point of the project.

We have you covered whether it’s for roof restoration, gutter repairs or re-roofing. All our services come fully insured and we're fully licensed so you can have peace of mind. We guarantee that your roof repairs or roof restoration will be completed with the utmost care, top quality and high standard by our registered roof tilers and roof plumbers.

Sandhurst Roofing will give you honest advice and understands the unique requirements of Karingal residents.

Get a Quote!

Gutter Repairs Karingal

At Sandhurst Roofing, our team of roof plumbers offer comprehenisve guttering services that will help you fulfil your individual needs. With over 30 years in the industry, we have extensive knowledge and the skills required to organise a well-engineered solution even the most complex guttering issue.

Guttering is one of the most important parts of your roof, and your home. It carries water away from the main structure of the house, preventing mould growth, leaks, sagging, rotting and more. COLORBOND® steel is one of the most durable materials, this means that not only will they do their job well, but they will last for years to come. That's why we use COLORBOND® steel for all new gutter installation. We pride ourselves on providing you with the highest quality finish possible, we do this by only using the highest quality products.

Contact the Roof Restoration Professionals in Karingal Now

Whether you live in Karingal, Langwarrin, Mount Eliza, Mornington, Frankston, Patterson Lakes or Seaford, our team of experts are here to help you.

Are you ready to get your next roofing project underway? Then call Steve on 0448 812 800 for a quote. You can also fill out the form below and we’ll get back to you as soon as we can.
